claimText: The Belem Mission to 1.5 C was launched by the COP29-COP31 Troika, which comprises the UAE, Azerbaijan, and Brazil.
evidenceExcerpt: The Belem Mission to 1.5 C was launched by the COP29-COP31 Troika (UAE, Azerbaijan, Brazil) as an action-oriented platform.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the members of the COP29-COP31 Troika or the launching entities of the Belem Mission.
distractorHooks: Troika comprising India, Brazil, and South Africa (IBSA)
Launched at COP28 by the European Union

claimText: The Global Implementation Accelerator is a voluntary initiative launched by the COP 30 and 31 Presidencies to support the implementation of Nationally Determined Contributions (NDCs) and National Adaptation Plans (NAPs).
evidenceExcerpt: The Global Implementation Accelerator is a voluntary initiative by COP 30 & 31 Presidencies to support NDC and NAP implementation.
examUse: Statement-based question on the purpose and launching entities of the Global Implementation Accelerator.
distractorHooks: Mandatory compliance mechanism under the Paris Agreement
Focuses exclusively on carbon market trading

claimText: The National Adaptation Plans (NAPs) Implementation Alliance was launched by a coalition including the UNDP, Italy, Germany, the NAP Global Network, and the NDC Partnership to mobilize investment for adaptation priorities.
evidenceExcerpt: The NAPs Implementation Alliance was launched by UNDP, Italy, Germany, NAP Global Network, and NDC Partnership to mobilize investment for national adaptation priorities.
examUse: Institution-feature question identifying the founding members and purpose of the NAPs Implementation Alliance.
distractorHooks: Launched solely by the Green Climate Fund
Aimed at mitigating greenhouse gas emissions in developed countries

claimText: The Tropical Forest Forever Facility (TFFF) aims to establish a $125 billion Tropical Forest Investment Fund (TFIF) to compensate tropical forest countries for maintaining and expanding their forest cover.
evidenceExcerpt: Primary Purpose: Establish a $125B fund Tropical Forest Investment Fund (TFIF) that pays tropical forest countries for maintaining and expanding forest cover.
examUse: Statement-based question on the financial target and objective of the Tropical Forest Forever Facility.
distractorHooks: Aims to establish a $10 billion fund
Compensates countries for transitioning to renewable energy
Penalizes countries for deforestation without providing financial incentives

claimText: The Tropical Forest Forever Facility (TFFF) was endorsed by Brazil, Indonesia, the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), and China.
evidenceExcerpt: The Tropical Forest Forever Facility (TFFF) was endorsed by Brazil, Indonesia, DRC, and China to establish a $125B Tropical Forest Investment Fund (TFIF).
examUse: Correct-pair or statement-based question identifying the endorsing countries of the TFFF.
distractorHooks: Endorsed by the USA, Canada, and Australia
Endorsed exclusively by Amazon basin countries
Endorsed by the European Union and Japan
